CommunityApplications.Profile:
HealthTrack — a self-hosted personal & family health tracker. Track medications, conditions, allergies, labs, vitals, procedures, vaccines, appointments and notes for yourself and your dependents, all in a single Docker container with SQLite storage under `/data`. No cloud services required.
Optional integrations each activate only when their keys are set (Anthropic API for AI features, Google OAuth for sign-in, Oura for ring sync). Bring-your-own device data via a scoped REST API (`/api/v1/...`).
Support and bug reports: GitHub issues (see the link below). This repository is actively maintained.
